studyName: Cell and Circuit-Specific Exploration of HIV Neurogenomics in Context of Opiate and Cocaine Misuse

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BARCODE
variables.description: Unique linker sequence used for non-pooled IS-seq libraries

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: CELL_TYPE
variables.description: Isolated cell type

variables.name: LIBRARY_TYPE
variables.description: Data type of sequencing library

variables.name: MOUSE_MIX
variables.description: Whether mouse tissue was mixed with human tissue prior to analysis

variables.name: POOL_BARCODE_1
variables.description: Unique linker sequence used for first subject in the pool

variables.description: Unique linker sequence used for second subject in the pool

variables.name: POOL_BARCODE_3
variables.description: Unique linker sequence used for third subject in the pool

variables.name: POOL_CELL_1
variables.description: Cell type of first subject in pool

variables.name: POOL_CELL_2
variables.description: Cell type of second subject in pool

variables.name: POOL_CELL_3
variables.description: Cell type of third subject in pool

variables.description: Subject ID of first subject in pool

variables.description: Subject ID of second subject in pool

variables.name: POOL_SUBJECT_3
variables.description: Subject ID of third subject in pool

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID
